stemHtml: ILS obstacle clearance surfaces are established under the assumption that the pilot does not allow the aircraft to deviate from the centreline by more than…

options.a: One and a half scales deflection after being established on the track.
options.b: A quarter of a scale deflection after being established on the track.
options.c: Half a scale deflection after being established on the track.
options.d: One full scale deflection after being established on the track.
